arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer news latest: Ruben Amorim to face 'competition' from Manchester City for Serie A midfielder
arts.sum: Manchester United may reportedly face competition from Manchester City for a Serie A midfielder that Ruben Amorim is targeting ahead of the 2025-26 season.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane's brutal Man Utd rant IN FULL after Newcastle loss: 'They're not good at anything!'
arts.sum: Roy Keane a LOT to say about Manchester United after their thrashing by Newcastle in the Premier League on Sunday, with the ex-captain slamming Ruben Amorim, Bruno Fernandes and more

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer comment after Newcastle thrash Man United speaks volumes - 'I expected that' - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: “Only one team was going to win that in the second half," he told Premier League Productions . The Magpies' manager missed the game through illness and assistant Jason Tindall stepped up to take the team for the match.

arts.ttl: Man United vote can't stop Newcastle as Bruno Fernandes stunned
arts.sum: However, the second half had not long got under way when Harvey Barnes put Newcastle back in front after getting on the end of Jacob Murphy's cross and the forward made it 3-1 just a few minutes later with a brilliant finish. Newcastle had chances to grab a quickfire second - Sandro Tonali fired wide from distance, Alexander Isak was denied by Altay Bayindir and Dan Burn saw a header loop on to the roof of the net - and Manchester United made the hosts pay for not taking them.

arts.ttl: Bayindir's failed Man Utd audition offers Onana dilemma
arts.sum: Altay Bayindir failed his audition to become Manchester United's first choice goalkeeper after Andre Onana was dropped for the defeat by Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim confirms bitter Man Utd injury blow for Lyon game: ‘He will be out’
arts.sum: Manchester United were thrashed 4-1 by Newcastle in the Premier League on Sunday - and their result was made even worse by a suspected hamstring injury for Joshua Zirkzee

arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | Auxerre 1-3 Lyon: Les Gones boost Champions League hopes ahead of Manchester United clash
arts.sum: Ligue 1 McDonald’s, Round 29, 13/04/2025 Lyon secured all three points thanks to goals from Rayan Cherki, Georges Mikautadze and Alexandre Lacazette. Les Gones have moved to 4th in the…

arts.ttl: Howe remains in hospital but Tindall sure Newcastle win has ‘lifted his spirits’
arts.athr: Louise Taylor at St James' Park
arts.sum: No update on condition but Howe well enough to watch Assistant Tindall took charge for Manchester United win Eddie Howe remains in hospital with an unspecified illness but was well enough to watch on television as his Newcastle side beat Manchester United 4-1 at St James’ Park yesterdayon Sunday. Jason Tindall, his assistant who took charge in the home technical area, said he was able to offer no update on Howe’s condition but added that he had received a congratulatory post‑match text from the manager. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'We had to put a smile on his face' - Newcastle dedicate win to Howe
arts.sum: Newcastle players and staff dedicate their crushing win over Manchester United to boss Eddie Howe, who missed the match as he is in hospital.

arts.ttl: 'It says it all' - Ruben Amorim blunt after another Man Utd hammering
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim offered no defence for Manchester United's latest shambolic showing, this time away at Newcastle United.
